fetch.code:
(function() { if (typeof window._oldfetch === 'undefined') { window._oldfetch = window.fetch; }; window._tmpfetchlog = ''; window.fetch = async (...args) => { let [resource, config] = args; try { window._tmpfetchlog += `
fetching: ${resource} / config=${JSON.stringify(config)}`; } catch (e) { window._tmpfetchlog += `
error: ${e}`; } return window._oldfetch(resource, config); }; return 'fetch hooked'; })()

fetch_log.code: (function() { if (typeof window._tmpfetchlog_history === 'undefined') { window._tmpfetchlog_history = []; } const tmp = window._tmpfetchlog; window._tmpfetchlog_history.push(tmp); window._tmpfetchlog = ''; return tmp; })()

xhr.code:
(function() { if (typeof window._oldxhropen === 'undefined') { window._oldxhropen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open; }window._tmpxhrlog = ''; XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(method, url) { window._tmpxhrlog += `
xhr: ${method} ${url}`; window._oldxhropen.apply(this, arguments); }; return 'xhr hooked'; })()

xhr_log.code: (function() { if (typeof window._tmpxhrlog_history === 'undefined') { window._tmpxhrlog_history = []; } const tmp = window._tmpxhrlog; window._tmpxhrlog_history.push(tmp); window._tmpxhrlog = ''; return tmp; })()

xhr_restore.code: (function() { XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(method, url) { window._oldxhropen.apply(this, arguments); }; return 'xhr restored'; })()
